{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032207004668F390A78C24B07221B8"}"},"total":2759},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7165332587173446431","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，我终于找到这本对于我来说很对味口的书了，无CP，不圣母。
花了一个上午的时间读完这本书后，我感觉这本书很精彩，特别符合我喜欢的类型，但却感觉心里很复杂，不知道为什么会出现这感受。
白歌的性格转变的既快又可以接受。
结局让我感到很意外，没有想到。
再仔细想一想，又感觉不意外了。
命运是很奇妙的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668309093,"group_id":"7138618096587115554","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"永不消逝","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N24yjzN0cFhpBNLp0jdChRFs12zd5d1sBn0GskQ/rBng","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fcabd5152b05488f9c10c034d79ec6a6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707103&x-signature=5gzFaBW5v5kprVrP6NeVt4tOy6o%3D","user_id":"3791571898862636","user_name":"哒xx"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3791571898862636","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7138618096587115554","book_info":{"abstract":"【忍术】+【惊悚】+【腹黑】+【极度变态】+【无女主】
【部分情节会引起个别人反感，慎入，圣母误入，请不要把现实道德代入小说世界！】
在惊悚世界生存两年半的白歌忽然得到忍术系统，只要完成任务就能够获得忍术的力量。
灵娃娃：“这个人类太残忍了，我只是没钱付配送费他就活生生的扣下了我的眼珠子。”
饿死鬼：“我本就瘦的只剩皮包骨头了，他还把我的脊椎骨给生生拔了下来。”
掏肛斑点狗：“你们那算什么，我腚子没闻到就算了，反倒被他戳爆了腚子！”
恭喜宿主获得娃娃恐吓者，血液亲和者，鬼祟美食家，鬼祟分尸者称号……
综合判断，宿主是个变态。
白歌：不不不，我只是想活下去而已。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/2535b45078d374c08636efbc443ec1a1~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"清墨白纸","author_id":"","book_id":"7138618096587115554","book_name":"不会真有人以为只能鬼吃人吧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7853人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7138638284351406592","read_count":"7853","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"452215"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"223","tags":"悬疑脑洞,系统,穿越,腹黑,灵异,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1e6d42cabb6cb434688b29a5cdd7fb6d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318046&x-signature=ut76f3GzeaG2vmS8kvpm2RukK9Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"53987112821","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.0181689e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032207004668F390A78C24B07221B8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":17,"forwar 当白歌以为自己无敌时，却发现自己只是别人的一枚棋子。
在这个有趣又无聊的世界，游戏永远不会结束。只有无尽的轮回……"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668272484,"group_id":"7138618096587115554","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"250308433031339"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7138618096587115554","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.9445056e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19444,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7165173867139892002","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错的黑暗文。主角不仅吃人也吃鬼。
从弱小到强大，心态也在一步步成长。
“我为何要适应世界，世界应该适应我！”
……
当你进入惊悚游戏时，除了游戏规则外。
记住：“小心一个叫白歌的男人。”","text_exts":[{"e":67,"s":63,"text":"惊悚游戏","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%83%8A%E6%82%9A%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774134046B07221B8%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227165173867139892002%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227138618096587115554%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%83%8A%E6%82%9A%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1668272250,"group_id":"7138618096587115554","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个撞石头的蛋duang～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2kfKTHWHnnOTnY+DK7e4uk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6fdeef73b0564d59a3399e8bc52a225f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707431&x-signature=bZf4YMlVPcvJjRLTFpOq3FGwzzg%3D","user_id":"250308433031339","user_name":"淡淡不是蛋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"250308433031339","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1708923615,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_d ded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19444,"reply_count":7,"show_pv":18555},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7187067254117335808","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"其实这本书对于我这种可以接受并且非常喜欢黑暗观，那种没有道理的杀戮的人，是非常非常非常爱的，直接戳到了我的心巴上，后续捅破一切的真相，更是让我觉得这本书上升了一大个档次
与真正的“我”较量，还有那深不可测的月亮，让人真的很有看下去一探究竟的欲望
还有白歌的目标—掌控，让我真真实实感觉到了，白歌的胆子很大，有魄力，敢于尝试，勇于面对，为了掌控那未知的未来，或许这就是这个人物的魅力所在
总之这本书给我的感受就是，深不可测的神秘，为了利益的杀戮，为了掌控自己的未来，为了活下去……
圣母的，受不了黑暗观，杀戮的别来，不想在这本书里看到这种差评，大大很用心的在写，描绘出了一个活生生的白歌，一个为了利益（？的世界"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1673369676,"group_id":"7138618096587115554","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"总之就是很喜欢","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5TTR5WXSaAD+dXzTlk8fOC5W7wzuPnX/OanLkaeKVHe","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9157240657a947fab29eba1642ccaf1f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710267&x-signature=VPgC2KC1KAzgN0K9h%2FcfRpzX%2Fcc%3D","user_id":"3628830607021616","user_name":"kk蔻"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3628830607021616","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1771567778,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7138618096587115554","book_info":{"abstract":"【忍术】+【惊悚】+【腹黑】+【极度变态】+【无女主】
